ceecdab5-f3d4-49ff-a631-5e1519300f98.label: text_chunk
ceecdab5-f3d4-49ff-a631-5e1519300f98.text:
Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement

THIS MUTUAL NON DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT is made and entered into this ____day of _________,   20______ between Product Development Experts, Inc. with address at; 2440 SE Federal Hwy., Suite 101-P Stuart FL 34994 and _______________________________________________________________________ (Inventor), with address at; __________________________________________________________________________________
Purpose.

25ae06d5-3174-4058-ae8d-b08d970321e9.label: text_chunk
25ae06d5-3174-4058-ae8d-b08d970321e9.text:
The parties wish to explore a business opportunity of mutual interest and in connection with this opportunity, each party may disclose to the other party certain confidential technical and business information which the disclosing party desires the receiving party to treat as confidential.

"Confidential Information" means any information disclosed by either party to the other party, either directly or indirectly,  in  writing,  orally  or  by  inspection  of  tangible  objects,  including  without  limitation  documents, prototypes,

da4056bb-e519-4f1e-87ff-0a54e45c7a7e.label: text_chunk
da4056bb-e519-4f1e-87ff-0a54e45c7a7e.text: samples,  plant  and  equipment,  research,  product  plans,  products,  services,  customer  lists,  software, developments, inventions, processes, designs, drawings, engineering, hardware configuration, marketing materials or  finances,  which  is  designated  as  "Confidential,"  "Proprietary"  or  some  similar  designation.

aa9ea267-7cde-4da2-8968-db16b000cbdd.label: text_chunk
aa9ea267-7cde-4da2-8968-db16b000cbdd.text:
Information communicated  orally  shall  be  considered  Confidential  Information  if  such  information  is  confirmed  in  writing  as being Confidential Information within a reasonable time after the initial disclosure.  Confidential Information may also  include  information  disclosed  to  a  disclosing  party  by  third  parties.

    Confidential  Information  shall  not, however,

b8d551c0-fde6-4367-a1f2-d5c11b14bfa4.label: text_chunk
b8d551c0-fde6-4367-a1f2-d5c11b14bfa4.text: include any information which (i) was publicly known and made generally available in the public domain prior to the time of disclosure by the disclosing party; (ii) becomes publicly known and made generally available after disclosure by the disclosing party to the receiving party through no action or inaction of the receiving party; (iii) is already in the possession of the receiving party at the time of disclosure by the disclosing party as shown by the receiving party's files and records immediately prior to the time of disclosure;

ff63d988-30db-4865-bef2-93516d779c94.label: text_chunk
ff63d988-30db-4865-bef2-93516d779c94.text: (iv) is obtained by the receiving party from a third party without a breach of such third party's obligations of confidentiality; (v) is independently developed by the receiving party without use of or reference to the disclosing party's Confidential Information, as shown by documents and other competent evidence in the receiving party's possession;  or (vi) is required by law to be disclosed by the receiving party,

0972e6bf-a572-496f-bc08-794992e7227e.label: text_chunk
0972e6bf-a572-496f-bc08-794992e7227e.text:
provided that the receiving party gives the disclosing party prompt written notice of such requirement prior to such disclosure and assistance in obtaining an order protecting the information from public disclosure.

Non-use  and  Non-disclosure.

f8b8ba96-baff-4814-8acc-4ec483b808b7.label: text_chunk
f8b8ba96-baff-4814-8acc-4ec483b808b7.text: Each  party  shall  not  use  the  Confidential  Information  of  the  other  party  for  any purpose  except  to  evaluate  and  engage  in  discussions  concerning  a  potential  business  relationship  between  the parties.  Neither party shall disclose any Confidential Information of the other party to third parties.

e4e59b4e-19f8-420f-ace1-0368a6bd0b69.label: text_chunk
e4e59b4e-19f8-420f-ace1-0368a6bd0b69.text: If any party makes  copies  of  the  Confidential  Information  of  the  other  party,  such  copies  shall  also  constitute  Confidential Information  and  any  and  all  confidential  markings  on  such  documents  shall  be  maintained.

1731a350-015b-492f-8d8e-4fedffbcc547.label: text_chunk
1731a350-015b-492f-8d8e-4fedffbcc547.text: Neither  party  shall reverse engineer, disassemble or decompile any prototypes, software or other tangible objects which embody the other party's Confidential Information and which are provided to the party hereunder.Maintenance  of  Confidentiality.    Each  party  shall  take  reasonable  measures  to  protect  the  secrecy  of  and  avoid disclosure  and  unauthorized  use  of  the  Confidential  Information  of  the  other  party.

e5c896b4-cae7-4c43-bfe9-9465ae92717c.label: text_chunk
e5c896b4-cae7-4c43-bfe9-9465ae92717c.text: Without  limiting  the foregoing, each party  shall take at least those measures that it takes to protect its own most highly confidential information,  and  shall  promptly  notify  the  disclosing  party  of  any  misuse  or  misappropriation  of  Confidential Information of which it becomes aware.

b1f5284f-e202-4d9d-b87a-0ac6eee0a368.label: text_chunk
b1f5284f-e202-4d9d-b87a-0ac6eee0a368.text:
Each party shall disclose Confidential Information only to those officers, directors, employees and contractors who are required to have the information in order to evaluate or engage in discussions  concerning  the  contemplated  business  relationship,  and  such  party  shall  remain  responsible  for compliance with the terms of this Agreement by its officers, directors, employees and contractors.Page 1 of 2
No Obligation.

d6fdd75e-e80c-4799-8d80-7f773b01455e.label: text_chunk
d6fdd75e-e80c-4799-8d80-7f773b01455e.text:
Nothing herein shall obligate either party to proceed with any transaction between them, and each party  reserves  the  right,  in  its  sole  discretion,  to  terminate  the  discussions  contemplated  by  this  Agreement concerning the business opportunity.No Warranty.  ALL CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION IS PROVIDED "AS IS.

"

12416076-74d1-4419-af55-df6e8f9b8f96.label: text_chunk
12416076-74d1-4419-af55-df6e8f9b8f96.text: NEITHER PARTY MAKES ANY WARRANTIES, EXPRESS, IMPLIED OR OTHERWISE, REGARDING ITS ACCURACY, COMPLETENESS OR PERFORMANCE.Paid For Work. All paid for information, work, designs, ideas will become the property of the payor (the person or company paying).Return of Materials.

afe4d2a5-631e-4d4b-a398-bc6b254e3e0e.label: text_chunk
afe4d2a5-631e-4d4b-a398-bc6b254e3e0e.text: All documents and other tangible objects containing or representing Confidential Information which have been disclosed by either party to the other party, and all copies thereof which are in the possession of the  other  party,  shall  be  and  remain  the  property  of  the  disclosing  party  and  shall  be  promptly  returned  to  the disclosing party upon the disclosing party's written request.No License.

363e985f-80fa-4c12-a99a-f8e55f926eb9.label: text_chunk
363e985f-80fa-4c12-a99a-f8e55f926eb9.text: Nothing in this Agreement is intended to grant any rights to either party under any patent, mask work right or copyright of the other party, nor shall this Agreement grant any party any rights in or to the Confidential Information of the other party except as expressly set forth herein.Term.

6bb57bcb-8e9a-4186-8597-e7a538a15044.label: text_chunk
6bb57bcb-8e9a-4186-8597-e7a538a15044.text: The obligations of each receiving party hereunder shall survive for a period of five years after the disclosure of  the  Confidential  Information  or  until  such  time  as  all  Confidential  Information  of  the  other  party  disclosed hereunder  becomes  publicly  known  and  made  generally  available  through  no  action  or  inaction  of  the  receiving party, whichever is earlier.

5c25c5c7-ca11-41e8-b639-d69f444d208e.label: text_chunk
5c25c5c7-ca11-41e8-b639-d69f444d208e.text:
Parties agree to honor all patent protections.

Remedies.  Each party agrees that any violation or threatened violation of this Agreement may cause irreparable injury to the other party, entitling the other party to seek injunctive relief in addition to all legal remedies.Choice of Laws and Forum.

e83bd444-bcc6-42ed-a925-859c688db628.label: text_chunk
e83bd444-bcc6-42ed-a925-859c688db628.text: The interpretation and enforcement of this Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Florida, U.S.A., as it applies to a contract executed, delivered, and performed solely in such state.

9510d962-4cda-44ce-bc7e-39c86490c168.label: text_chunk
9510d962-4cda-44ce-bc7e-39c86490c168.text: Both  PARTIES  agree  that  all  disputes  concerning  the  interpretation  and  enforcement  of  this  Agreement  shall  be heard  by  a  court  of  competent  jurisdiction  in  the  State  of  Florida,  U.S.A.    Furthermore,  both  PARTIES  hereby consents  to  personal  jurisdiction  in  the  State  of  Florida,  U.S.A.

450610ee-c5f9-4428-b132-02b2cfd7e2b3.label: text_chunk
450610ee-c5f9-4428-b132-02b2cfd7e2b3.text: ,  for  any  dispute  arising  out  of  a  violation  of  this Agreement, or any attempt to recover losses incurred on such dispute.Miscellaneous.  Neither party may assign its rights or obligations under this Agreement without the prior written consent of the other party.  Any attempted assignment in violation of this Section 11 will be null and void.  This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Florida, without reference to conflict of laws principles.

50ddcfde-ca71-42df-b923-90ba0b047e64.label: text_chunk
50ddcfde-ca71-42df-b923-90ba0b047e64.text: This document contains the entire agreement between the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof, and neither  party  shall  have  any  obligation,  express  or  implied  by  law,  with  respect  to  trade  secret  or  proprietary information of the other party except as set forth herein.

30cd339f-d32a-48f9-80f4-43e2bf8d9902.label: text_chunk
30cd339f-d32a-48f9-80f4-43e2bf8d9902.text: The invalidity or unenforceability of any provision of this Agreement, or any of its terms or provisions, will not affect the validity of this Agreement as a whole, which will at all times remain in full force and effect.  A failure to enforce any provision of this Agreement will not constitute a waiver thereof or of any other provision.  This Agreement may not be amended, nor any obligation waived, except by a writing signed by both parties hereto.

56552630-f317-49ee-9a3c-26e827c53d48.label: text_chunk
56552630-f317-49ee-9a3c-26e827c53d48.text: Any notices required to be given under this agreement shall be deemed given upon the earlier of receipt of five (5) days after mailing by certified mail, return receipt requested, or hand delivery by messenger or express service, to the addresses stated on the first page, or to such other address as the either party may specify to the other in writing form time to time.Product Development Experts, Inc.

community_summary.0: The relationship between Product Development Experts, Inc. and the Inventor is characterized by a collaborative partnership, underscored by the establishment of a Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement. This agreement signifies that both parties are committed to sharing confidential information, facilitating a cooperative environment for product development. The mutual understanding and trust inherent in this relationship are crucial for fostering innovation and protecting intellectual property during the development process.
community_summary.1:
The relationships between the entities "Parties" and their interactions can be summarized as follows:

1. **Parties and Confidential Information**: The parties are interconnected through the potential disclosure of confidential information, which is essential for exploring business opportunities together.

2. **Parties and Agreement**: The parties have entered into a legal agreement, signifying their mutual consent to the terms specified in the document, thereby formalizing their relationship and obligations.

Overall, the relationships highlight the collaborative nature of the parties as they navigate business opportunities while ensuring confidentiality and legal compliance through their agreement.
community_summary.2:
The relationships between the entities highlight the interconnectedness of research and product development. 

1. **Research** is linked to **Products** through the action of **Develops**, indicating that research plays a crucial role in the creation and enhancement of products. The relationship emphasizes that research is often aimed at developing new products or improving existing ones.

2. The reverse relationship also shows that **Develops** is associated with **Research** and **Products**, reinforcing the idea that the development process is fundamentally driven by research efforts focused on product innovation and improvement.

In summary, the core relationship is that research is essential for the development of products, underscoring its significance in fostering innovation and enhancing product offerings.
community_summary.3: The relationships between the entities highlight the role of marketing materials in the promotion of products. Specifically, marketing materials are designed to advertise and promote products to potential customers. This emphasizes the significance of marketing materials as essential tools in the marketing strategy, aimed at enhancing product visibility and attracting consumer interest.
community_summary.4: The relationship between "Confidential Information" and "disclosing party" highlights the process of sharing sensitive information. The "disclosing party" is responsible for providing this information to another entity, typically under confidentiality agreements to ensure that the information remains protected. This relationship underscores the importance of trust and legal frameworks in the handling of confidential data.
community_summary.5:
The relationships outlined involve a "Disclosing Party" and a "Receiving Party," as well as an "Other Party." The core theme across these relationships is the act of disclosure, where the Disclosing Party shares confidential information with the Receiving Party and the Other Party. 

1. **Disclosing Party and Receiving Party**: The Disclosing Party shares information, which may include confidential details that are not publicly known, with the Receiving Party. This relationship emphasizes the trust and obligation associated with handling sensitive information.

2. **Disclosing Party and Other Party**: Similarly, the Disclosing Party shares Confidential Information with the Other Party, establishing a relationship of trust and obligation regarding the management of that information.

Overall, these relationships highlight the importance of confidentiality and trust in the exchange of sensitive information between parties.
community_summary.6:
The relationships outlined involve a "Receiving Party," a "Disclosing Party," and a "Third Party," focusing on the handling of confidential information. 

1. **Receiving Party and Third Party**: The Receiving Party obtains relevant information from the Third Party, which is crucial for adhering to confidentiality obligations specified in their agreement.

2. **Receiving Party and Disclosing Party**: The Receiving Party is obligated to protect the confidential information provided by the Disclosing Party. This includes ensuring that such information is not disclosed without proper authorization.

3. **Obligations of the Receiving Party**: The Receiving Party has a duty to promptly notify the Disclosing Party if there is any requirement to disclose the confidential information, thereby maintaining transparency and compliance with confidentiality terms.

4. **Role of the Receiving Party**: The Receiving Party is identified as the entity responsible for receiving and safeguarding the confidential information, emphasizing its critical role in the protection of sensitive data.

In summary, the Receiving Party plays a pivotal role in managing confidential information, with clear obligations to protect it and communicate with the Disclosing Party, while also obtaining relevant information from Third Parties to fulfill these responsibilities.
community_summary.7:
The relationships outlined in the knowledge graph primarily revolve around the handling of Confidential Information between two parties engaged in a potential business relationship. 

1. **Use of Confidential Information**: Each party is permitted to use the Confidential Information solely for evaluating and discussing a potential business relationship, emphasizing the limited scope of usage.

2. **Disclosure Restrictions**: Both parties are prohibited from disclosing each other's Confidential Information to third parties, highlighting the importance of confidentiality in their interactions.

3. **Creation of Confidential Information**: Any copies made of the Confidential Information are also classified as Confidential Information, indicating that the act of duplication carries the same confidentiality obligations.

4. **Protection of Confidential Information**: Each party is responsible for implementing reasonable measures to safeguard the secrecy of the other party's Confidential Information, reflecting a mutual protective obligation.

5. **Legal Restrictions**: There are explicit restrictions against reverse engineering, disassembling, or decompiling the Confidential Information, which underscores the legal boundaries set to protect proprietary information.

6. **Compliance Responsibility**: Each party is accountable for ensuring that its officers adhere to the terms of the agreement regarding Confidential Information, indicating a hierarchical responsibility for compliance.

7. **Engagement in Discussions**: The parties are actively engaged in discussions about the business opportunity as outlined in their agreement, which signifies a collaborative relationship aimed at exploring potential ventures.

In summary, the relationships emphasize a framework of mutual respect and legal obligations concerning Confidential Information, ensuring that both parties can explore business opportunities while maintaining the integrity and confidentiality of sensitive information.
community_summary.8: In the provided relationships, the entity "PAYOR" is linked to "MATERIALS" through the concept of ownership. The relationship emphasizes that the payor, whether an individual or organization, is entitled to ownership of the materials because they have compensated for the work or information. This entitlement grants them rights to the materials, reinforcing the significance of financial investment in acquiring ownership. The relationship is consistently described, highlighting the payor's rights stemming from their payment.
community_summary.9:
**Summary of Relationships:**

The entity "PARTY" is associated with "Legal Obligation" through the concept of "WARRANTIES." This relationship indicates that the party involved in an agreement has a legal responsibility to uphold any warranties made, ensuring the accuracy and performance of the work provided. The emphasis on legal obligation highlights the significance of these warranties in contractual agreements, reinforcing the accountability of the party in fulfilling their commitments.
community_summary.10: In the provided relationships, the entities involved are the "other party" and the "disclosing party." The key relationship is centered around a "return obligation," which stipulates that the other party is legally required to return any Confidential Information to the disclosing party upon request. This obligation arises from the initial disclosure of the information, emphasizing the legal responsibilities that govern the handling of confidential data between the two parties. The relationship underscores the importance of confidentiality and the mechanisms in place to protect sensitive information.
community_summary.11:
The relationships summarized from the knowledge graph revolve around the concept of an "Agreement" and its various attributes and legal implications:

   - The Agreement is a formal document that outlines the involvement of the parties, establishing a contractual relationship.

   - The Agreement is governed by the **State of Florida**, meaning that Florida law applies to its terms, establishing a legal framework for enforcement and interpretation.
   - The Agreement is **self-referencing**, indicating that it contains provisions that refer back to itself, ensuring its validity and enforceability even if some individual provisions are deemed invalid.

Overall, the Agreement serves as a comprehensive legal document that defines the roles of the parties, protects intellectual property rights, adheres to specific jurisdictional laws, and maintains internal consistency in its provisions.

community_summary.19: The Whistleblower Protection Act is a significant piece of legislation that amends Title 5 of the United States Code. Its primary purpose is to enhance protections for whistleblowers, ensuring that individuals who report misconduct or illegal activities are safeguarded from retaliation. This relationship underscores the Act's role in promoting transparency and accountability within organizations by providing legal protections to those who come forward with critical information.

community_summary.22:
The relationships involving the Protected Critical Infrastructure Information (PCII) highlight the management and ownership dynamics surrounding this sensitive information category. 

1. **PCII and PCII Program Manager**: The PCII Program Manager is responsible for overseeing the PCII program, ensuring its operations and compliance. This indicates a management relationship where the Program Manager plays a crucial role in the program's governance.

2. **Authorization by PCII Program Manager**: The PCII Program Manager holds the authority to authorize any changes or removals of PCII, establishing a direct and significant relationship between the manager and the information category.

3. **Ownership by the United States Government**: The PCII is owned by the entity that possesses it, specifically including the United States Government. This ownership implies that the government is a key stakeholder in the management and disclosure of PCII.

In summary, the PCII Program Manager is central to the management and authorization processes of PCII, while the United States Government holds ownership, underscoring the importance of governance and compliance in handling this critical information.
community_summary.23: The relationship between "Sensitive but Unclassified Information" and "Section 552a of Title 5" highlights the legal framework that safeguards individual privacy rights. Specifically, Section 552a of Title 5 governs sensitive but unclassified information, establishing the necessary protections for personal privacy. This relationship underscores the importance of legal guidelines in managing and protecting sensitive information that does not meet the criteria for classified status but still requires careful handling to ensure privacy rights are upheld.
community_summary.24:
The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) plays a crucial role in managing and protecting sensitive information related to national security. It categorizes information as For Official Use Only (FOUO) to safeguard it from public disclosure, ensuring that sensitive details remain confidential. Additionally, DHS manages Sensitive Homeland Security Information (SHSI) to uphold national security and public safety. 

Furthermore, DHS has the authority over Authorized Individuals, who are designated personnel empowered to request the return of information from those who have accessed it, reinforcing the security protocols associated with DHS operations. Overall, these relationships underscore DHS's commitment to protecting sensitive information and maintaining national security.
community_summary.25:
The relationships outlined highlight the regulatory and enforcement dynamics between the United States Government and an Authorized Entity concerning DHS Form 11000-6 and Protected Critical Infrastructure Information (PCII).

1. **Regulation of DHS Form 11000-6**: The United States Government regulates the use and compliance of DHS Form 11000-6, which pertains to the handling and safeguarding of information under specific agreements.

2. **Authorization of the Authorized Entity**: The United States Government grants authority to the Authorized Entity, enabling it to enforce agreements and manage disclosures related to PCII.

3. **Enforcement Mechanisms**: The United States Government retains the right to seek remedies against the Authorized Entity to ensure compliance with the terms of the Agreement, establishing a legal oversight relationship.

In summary, the United States Government plays a crucial role in regulating information handling through DHS Form 11000-6, authorizing an entity to manage sensitive information, and enforcing compliance to maintain the integrity of agreements related to critical infrastructure information.

The relationships outlined highlight the City’s proactive approach to managing infrastructure and securing funding for various projects.

Furthermore, the City oversees the City Hall Roof Replacement project, showcasing its commitment to maintaining local infrastructure.

3. **Collaboration for Improvement**: The City collaborates with FEMA to develop a storm drain inventory, leveraging federal funding to improve infrastructure in response to challenges posed by events such as the Woolsey Fire.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the City’s strategic efforts in funding acquisition, project management, and collaboration with federal agencies to enhance community infrastructure and resilience.
